item.title: Chatbot Frontend Development & UI Enhancement
item.description:
Overview

Collaborated with Professor Ryan McGhee at the ISU Department of Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering to develop a versatile chatbot frontend that significantly improves user experience and interface design.

Key Responsibilities

  • Frontend development and architecture
  • User interface design and enhancement
  • User experience optimization
  • Integration with backend systems
  • Iterative design based on user feedback

Skills Applied

  • Modern web frameworks and technologies
  • Responsive UI design
  • User-centered design principles
  • Software development best practices

item.title: Medical AI Safety & Ethical Alignment
item.description:
Overview

Developed novel approaches to enhance the safety and ethical compliance of medical LLM outputs. This research addresses critical challenges in deploying AI for healthcare:

  • Multi-agent evaluation frameworks using specialized LLMs as evaluator agents
  • Iterative refinement against established healthcare standards (AMA-9 Principles)
  • Safety Risk Assessment (SRA-5) tier implementation
  • Byzantine-resilient aggregation with differential privacy guarantees

Key Achievements

  • ACM-BCB 2025 Presentation - Poster presentation at The 16th ACM Conference on Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, and Health Informatics
  • Developed framework pairing generative models (DeepSeek R1, Med-PaLM) with evaluator agents (LLaMA 3.1, Phi-4)
  • Focus on real-world deployment challenges and regulatory compliance

item.title: Vision-Language Models for Agriculture
item.description:
Overview

Exploring how state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) can be adapted and optimized for specialized agricultural tasks. This research contributes to advancing precision agriculture through AI.

Research Focus

  • Benchmarking VLMs on agricultural datasets
  • Specialized prompt engineering for farm-related tasks
  • Cross-modal understanding of agricultural imagery
  • Real-world deployment in agricultural systems

Publications

  • WACV 2025 - “Leveraging Vision Language Models for Specialized Agricultural Tasks” (IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision)
  • Research on protein structural prediction (Bioemu-1 benchmarking at AIChE 2025)

Applications

  • Crop disease and pest identification
  • Yield estimation
  • Field condition assessment
  • Climate-aware agricultural decision support

item.title: LLMs in Finance: Enhancing Decision-Making Processes
item.description:
Overview

Collaborating with Professor Soumik Sarkar at the Translational AI Center to explore how LLMs can enhance decision-making processes in finance. This research includes:

  • Analyzing how LLMs interpret market signals and business fundamentals
  • Studying investor behavior through the lens of AI analysis (Shark Tank data)
  • Developing frameworks for AI-assisted financial analysis
  • Understanding market orientation and brand storytelling effects on investment decisions

Key Contributions

  • Published research on market orientation and startup pitch evaluation (JBIM, REU 2025)
  • Developed LLM-based analytical frameworks for entrepreneurship and investment analysis
  • Presented findings at TrAC Day 2025 and REU Summer Symposium 2025
